message:
fix(json): centralize JSON string escaping to prevent malformed output

- Create src/utils/json.zig with escapeString and escapeContents functions
- Fix typeText, sendCharWithModifiers, sendSpecialKeyWithModifiers in interact.zig
- Fix URL escaping in screenshot.zig, session ID in cdp_pipe.zig
- Fix file paths, directory names, and dialog text in viewer.zig
- Remove duplicate escapeJsonString functions from cdp_client.zig and viewer.zig
